title: Status bar — visible point count after loading
capture_instructions: Close-up of the bottom status bar after the Queens Campus (Segmented) point cloud has finished loading. The status bar must display a visible point count (e.g. '1,240,000 points' or similar). The point cloud should be visible in the viewport above. Crop or annotate to draw attention to the status bar.
ui_state: Point cloud fully loaded, status bar showing non-zero point count

annotations.label: Status bar is at the bottom of the window
